name: Cinnamon Cookies/no Sugar
recipeInstructions: Beat eggs and water until light and fluffy. Beat in sugar replacement and cinnamon. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl. Sift half the dry ingredients over the egg mixture. Fold to completely blend. Repeat with the remaining dry ingredients. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets, 2 to 3 inches apart. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
